title: Our Services
subTitle: Scalebio supports early-stage biotech companies in moving from technical validation to commercial readiness.

workflow_process.title: Our Process Workflow
workflow_process.description: Our approach is structured, collaborative, and tailored to each company's needs.

process_steps.title: Initial contact
process_steps.description: An initial discussion to understand your goals, challenges, and areas of focus.

process_steps.title: Company evaluation
process_steps.description: A detailed evaluation of the company's technology, market, and team.

process_steps.title: Discussion of focus points
process_steps.description: A detailed discussion of the focus points and the areas of focus.

process_steps.title: What we can offer
process_steps.description: A detailed discussion of the what we can offer and the value we can bring to the table.

process_steps.title: Contract agreement
process_steps.description: A contract agreement to formalize the collaboration and define the scope of work.

how_we_work.title: How We Support Your Business
how_we_work.description: Helping early-stage biotech ventures turn scientific potential into commercial readiness.

work_steps.title: Product Pipeline Strategy
work_steps.description: Advising on the optimization and prioritization of the product development pipeline.

work_steps.title: Market Analysis Support
work_steps.description: Delivering insights and support related to market trends, competitive landscape, and market entry strategies.

work_steps.title: Business Development Advisory
work_steps.description: Supporting strategic partnerships, regulatory planning, funding opportunities, and go-to-market strategy.

work_steps.title: Pitch Deck Review
work_steps.description: Reviewing and providing input on pitch decks for investment and partnership presentations.
